free_text: The Cr(n,x gamma) reaction cross section for incident
Neutron flux at sample position determined using
flux monitored using plastic scintillators at 30-m
Corrected for self-absorption and neutron self-
shielding in sample. Contribution to the observed
cross section for 0.511-MeV gamma due to pair
production in the sample was analytically removed.
Data errors given do not include 10%
uncertainty in overall normalization due mainly to the
determination of the incident neutron flux.
Converted to new data formts, lower case.
